task_completion.description: Open the initial draft document in Calligra Words
task_completion.visual_evidence: Calligra Words application is open displaying a document with the title 'Living with Heart Failure: Patient Guide'.

task_completion.description: Format the page layout for a tri-fold brochure
task_completion.visual_evidence: The document page layout is visually configured as a tri-fold brochure, typically evidenced by landscape page orientation and the text being divided into three distinct columns.

task_completion.description: Format typography including headings and italics
task_completion.visual_evidence: Section headings (e.g., 'Introduction', 'Symptoms to Watch For') are visually distinct (e.g., larger font, bolded). The 'Medical Disclaimer:' text or other specific emphasis text is formatted in italics.

task_completion.description: Format structural elements including a list and a table
task_completion.visual_evidence: A properly formatted bulleted or numbered list is visible in the document, and a table (likely for the 'Daily Weight Log') is inserted and properly aligned within the column structure.

task_completion.description: Save the finished document with the correct filename
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Calligra Words window title bar displays 'heart_failure_brochure_print.odt', or a 'Save As' dialog box is visible saving the file to '/home/ga/Documents/heart_failure_brochure_print.odt'.

integrity.description: Agent used the Calligra Words GUI to format the document
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through Calligra Words menus, toolbars, or dialog boxes (e.g., Page Layout, Columns, Text Styles) rather than using terminal commands or scripts to modify the .odt file.

integrity.description: Formatting was applied within the actual application
integrity.visual_evidence: The visual changes to the document (columns, tables, fonts) are seen rendered inside the Calligra Words workspace, not in a basic text editor or a mocked-up image.

integrity.description: Agent did not simply copy a pre-made finished file
integrity.visual_evidence: There is a progression of screenshots showing the document being actively formatted step-by-step, rather than just a single screenshot of the finished file appearing instantly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file must be saved as '/home/ga/Documents/heart_failure_brochure_print.odt'. The document must contain the title 'Living with Heart Failure: Patient Guide' and the exact headings: 'Introduction', 'Symptoms to Watch For', 'Dietary Guidelines', 'Fluid Management', and 'Daily Weight Log'. The text 'Medical Disclaimer:' must be present. The document text contains the keywords: 'pumping', 'oxygen', 'fatigue', 'swelling', 'sodium', 'restrict', and 'gelatin'.
